resources.string:
Gesture Control uses your front camera to detect hand gestures and control your phone without touching the screen.
Supported gestures: • Fist → Pause / Resume gesture control • Index finger → Move cursor (Finger Mouse) • Index + Middle up → Scroll up • Middle up, Index curled → Scroll down • Spread fingers → Zoom in • Close fingers → Zoom out • Thumb + Middle hold → Long press
